title: CodyTravis' HUD Resprite
body:
CodyTravis' HUD Resprite is a resource pack that revamps some of the HUD elements in Minecraft’s default style. The goal is to make your interface more visually appealing.

⭐ Features:
- **Added full visual overhaul**:
  - Health bar
  - Food bar
  - EXP bar
  - Armor bar
  - Oxygen bar

Compatible with vanilla.

![Featured sprites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/698a624a80fbaab3097ab9d29e17f2474c906c5c_0.webp)
